summary: Tested Enhanced User Creation Flow (POST /api/admin/users/create). Backend: 13/13 tests passed (100%). Frontend code review verified - all required fields and features implemented correctly. Note: Preview URL redirects to production app which has old UI version.

minor.issue: Contact model doesn't include 'title' and 'company' fields - they are stored in MongoDB but not returned by API. This is a minor schema mismatch.

integration_issues.issue: Preview URL (scheduler-update-1.preview.emergentagent.com) redirects to production app (app.imonsocial.com) which has old invite-team UI without first_name/last_name/phone fields

action_items: Verify frontend deployment - preview URL shows old UI version without enhanced fields
Consider adding 'title' and 'company' fields to Contact model for consistency
critical_code_review_comments: Backend POST /api/admin/users/create correctly validates required fields: first_name, last_name, email, phone (lines 835-843)
Backend correctly saves enrichment data (title, company, website, social_links) to user profile (lines 882-889)
Backend auto-creates Contact under creator with tags=['new-user'] (lines 955-979)
Backend returns contact_created=true, sms_sent status, temp_password in response (lines 981-994)
Backend sets onboarding_complete=False and needs_password_change=True for new users (lines 865-866)
Frontend invite-team.tsx has correct form fields: firstName, lastName, email, phone (lines 353-416)
Frontend has collapsible extras section with title, company, website, social links (lines 430-476)
Frontend shows result card with SMS sent status, contact created badge, tap-to-copy password (lines 271-341)
Twilio SMS is in MOCK mode - sms_sent may return false in test environment

success_rate.frontend: Code review passed - UI not testable via preview URL (redirects to production)

seed_data_creation: Test users created with TEST_ prefix and unique UUIDs, cleaned up after each test
context_for_next_testing_agent: Enhanced user creation backend fully tested. All 13 tests pass including: required field validation (first_name, last_name, email, phone), enrichment data persistence (title, company, website, social_links), auto-contact creation with 'new-user' tag, SMS toggle (mocked), temp password generation, onboarding flags. Frontend code review verified but UI testing blocked by preview URL redirect to production.

mocked_apis.note: Twilio SMS is in MOCK mode - send_sms returns mock success but actual SMS not sent
